# Tabs

A tabbed interface component for organizing content into separate panels, where only one panel is visible at a time. Built with composable sub-components.

## Import

```jsx
import { Tabs } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `Tabs` | Root container that manages tab state |
| `Tabs.List` | Container for the tab triggers |
| `Tabs.Trigger` | Individual tab trigger button |
| `Tabs.Content` | Content panel associated with a tab |
| `Tabs.ContentGroup` | Container for grouping tab content panels |
| `Tabs.Indicator` | Animated indicator that follows the active tab |

## Props

### Tabs (Root)

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `variant` | `"line" \| "enclosed" \| "outline" \| "plain"` | `"line"` | The visual style variant |
| `size` | `"sm" \| "md" \| "lg"` | `"md"` | The size of the tabs |
| `defaultValue` | `string` | - | The initially active tab value |
| `value` | `string` | - | Controlled active tab value |
| `onValueChange` | `(details: { value: string }) => void` | - | Callback when the active tab changes |
| `fitted` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether tabs should stretch to fill the container width |
| `orientation` | `"horizontal" \| "vertical"` | `"horizontal"` | The orientation of the tab list |
| `lazyMount` | `boolean` | `false` | Only mount tab content when the tab is active |
| `unmountOnExit` | `boolean` | `false` | Unmount tab content when the tab is not active |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the underlying element |

### Tabs.Trigger

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `value` | `string` | - | Unique identifier for this tab (required) |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Disables the tab |

### Tabs.Content

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `value` | `string` | - | The tab value this content is associated with (required) |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<Tabs defaultValue="tab-1">
  <Tabs.List>
    <Tabs.Trigger value="tab-1">Overview</Tabs.Trigger>
    <Tabs.Trigger value="tab-2">Settings</Tabs.Trigger>
    <Tabs.Trigger value="tab-3">Billing</Tabs.Trigger>
  </Tabs.List>

  <Tabs.Content value="tab-1">Overview content here</Tabs.Content>
  <Tabs.Content value="tab-2">Settings content here</Tabs.Content>
  <Tabs.Content value="tab-3">Billing content here</Tabs.Content>
</Tabs>
```

### Variants

```jsx
<Tabs variant="line" defaultValue="tab-1">...</Tabs>
<Tabs variant="enclosed" defaultValue="tab-1">...</Tabs>
<Tabs variant="outline" defaultValue="tab-1">...</Tabs>
<Tabs variant="plain" defaultValue="tab-1">...</Tabs>
```

### Fitted tabs

```jsx
<Tabs defaultValue="tab-1" fitted>
  <Tabs.List>
    <Tabs.Trigger value="tab-1">First</Tabs.Trigger>
    <Tabs.Trigger value="tab-2">Second</Tabs.Trigger>
    <Tabs.Trigger value="tab-3">Third</Tabs.Trigger>
  </Tabs.List>
  {/* content */}
</Tabs>
```

### With indicator

```jsx
<Tabs defaultValue="tab-1" variant="plain">
  <Tabs.List>
    <Tabs.Trigger value="tab-1">Overview</Tabs.Trigger>
    <Tabs.Trigger value="tab-2">Details</Tabs.Trigger>
    <Tabs.Indicator />
  </Tabs.List>
  {/* content */}
</Tabs>
```

### Controlled

```jsx
const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("tab-1");

<Tabs value={activeTab} onValueChange={(details) => setActiveTab(details.value)}>
  <Tabs.List>
    <Tabs.Trigger value="tab-1">Tab 1</Tabs.Trigger>
    <Tabs.Trigger value="tab-2">Tab 2</Tabs.Trigger>
  </Tabs.List>
  <Tabs.Content value="tab-1">First panel</Tabs.Content>
  <Tabs.Content value="tab-2">Second panel</Tabs.Content>
</Tabs>
```

### Lazy mounting

```jsx
<Tabs defaultValue="tab-1" lazyMount unmountOnExit>
  <Tabs.List>
    <Tabs.Trigger value="tab-1">Light Tab</Tabs.Trigger>
    <Tabs.Trigger value="tab-2">Heavy Tab</Tabs.Trigger>
  </Tabs.List>
  <Tabs.Content value="tab-1">Always lightweight content</Tabs.Content>
  <Tabs.Content value="tab-2">Heavy content only mounted when active</Tabs.Content>
</Tabs>
```

## Features

- 4 visual variants: line, enclosed, outline, and plain
- Supports horizontal and vertical orientations
- Supports controlled and uncontrolled usage
- Fitted mode stretches tabs to fill the available width
- Lazy mounting and unmount-on-exit for performance optimization
- Animated tab indicator component
- Individual tabs can be disabled
- Supports keyboard navigation
- Forwards refs on all sub-components
